items.line_en: Join Kids Hat Family.

items.line_en: Tofu, can you calculate this?

coach.say: Tofu, can you calculate this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tofu, / can you calculate this?

items.line_en: No, I don't get it.

coach.say: No, I don't get it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / I don't get it.

items.line_en: Tofu, this is such a simple calculation.

coach.say: Tofu, this is such a simple calculation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tofu, / this is such a simple calculation.

items.line_en: I do not expect this from you.

coach.say: I do not expect this from you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I do not expect this from you.

items.line_en: Are you not practicing numbers at home?

coach.say: Are you not practicing numbers at home?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Are you not practicing numbers at home?

items.line_en: I want to see all your homework tomorrow.

coach.say: I want to see all your homework tomorrow.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I want to see all your homework tomorrow.

items.line_en: My homework?

coach.say: My homework?
coach.hint: Chunk it: My homework?

items.line_en: Okay, teacher.

coach.say: Okay, teacher.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / teacher.

items.line_en: What happened, Tofu?

coach.say: What happened, Tofu?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What happened, / Tofu?

items.line_en: You look upset.

coach.say: You look upset.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You look upset.

items.line_en: My teacher scolded me because I was not able to do a simple maths calculation.

coach.say: My teacher scolded me because I was not able to do a simple maths calculation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My teacher scolded me because / I was not able to do a simple maths calculation.

items.line_en: Oh, Tofu, this is because you are not practicing what you are taught at school every day.

coach.say: Oh, Tofu, this is because you are not practicing what you are taught at school every day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / Tofu, / this is because you are not practicing what you are taught at school every day.

items.line_en: That is why we are given homework.

coach.say: That is why we are given homework.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That is why we are given homework.

items.line_en: Practice makes a man perfect.

coach.say: Practice makes a man perfect.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Practice makes a man perfect.

items.line_en: Can you tell me a story about it so I can understand better Tia?

coach.say: Can you tell me a story about it so I can understand better Tia?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you tell me a story about it so / I can understand better Tia?

items.line_en: Yes, Tofu, I will tell you a story.

coach.say: Yes, Tofu, I will tell you a story.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / Tofu, / I will tell you a story.

items.line_en: Homework is important.

coach.say: Homework is important.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Homework is important.

items.line_en: Once upon a time, they lift two squirrels on a tree, named Cass and X.

coach.say: Once upon a time, they lift two squirrels on a tree, named Cass and X.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Once upon a time, / they lift two squirrels on a tree, / named Cass and X.

items.line_en: The mother taught them every day how to troll down a tall tree.

coach.say: The mother taught them every day how to troll down a tall tree.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The mother taught them every day how to troll down a tall tree.

items.line_en: Cass climbed down the tree every day for practice.

coach.say: Cass climbed down the tree every day for practice.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Cass climbed down the tree every day for practice.

items.line_en: While decks lied on the branch and ate nuts all the time.

coach.say: While decks lied on the branch and ate nuts all the time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: While decks lied on the branch and / ate nuts all the time.

items.line_en: One day an eagle tried to attack them.

coach.say: One day an eagle tried to attack them.
coach.hint: Chunk it: One day an eagle tried to attack them.

items.line_en: Cass ran down the tree, but decks couldn't.

coach.say: Cass ran down the tree, but decks couldn't.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Cass ran down the tree, / but decks couldn't.

items.line_en: He directly jumped down in fear and injured himself badly.

coach.say: He directly jumped down in fear and injured himself badly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: He directly jumped down in fear and / injured himself badly.

items.line_en: Thereafter, decks learned his lesson and started practicing how to crawl down a tree every day.

coach.say: Thereafter, decks learned his lesson and started practicing how to crawl down a tree every day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thereafter, / decks learned his lesson and started practicing how to crawl down a tree every day.

items.line_en: He became perfected it, and one day when the eagle tried to attack them,

coach.say: He became perfected it, and one day when the eagle tried to attack them,
coach.hint: Chunk it: He became perfected it, / and one day when the eagle tried to attack them,

items.line_en: he swiftly crawled down and protected himself.

coach.say: he swiftly crawled down and protected himself.
coach.hint: Chunk it: he swiftly crawled down and / protected himself.

items.line_en: The eagle flew away in anger as he could not catch decks this time.

coach.say: The eagle flew away in anger as he could not catch decks this time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The eagle flew away in anger as he could not catch decks this time.

items.line_en: decks must be heard so badly.

coach.say: decks must be heard so badly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: decks must be heard so / badly.

items.line_en: Tia, this means practice makes a man perfect.

coach.say: Tia, this means practice makes a man perfect.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tia, / this means practice makes a man perfect.

items.line_en: That's right Tofu.

coach.say: That's right Tofu.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's right Tofu.

items.line_en: How did you calculate it so fast?

coach.say: How did you calculate it so fast?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How did you calculate it so / fast?

items.line_en: It's all about practice Tofu.

coach.say: It's all about practice Tofu.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's all about practice Tofu.

items.line_en: Always completing your homework will give you enough practice.

coach.say: Always completing your homework will give you enough practice.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Always completing your homework will give you enough practice.

items.line_en: Once you are good at calculating, you can make these bills instead of me.

coach.say: Once you are good at calculating, you can make these bills instead of me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Once you are good at calculating, / you can make these bills instead of me.

items.line_en: Yay! I will calculate the bills too!

coach.say: Yay! I will calculate the bills too!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yay! / I will calculate the bills too!

items.line_en: Tia, I'm ready to calculate the bills now.

coach.say: Tia, I'm ready to calculate the bills now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tia, / I'm ready to calculate the bills now.

items.line_en: That's great Tofu.

coach.say: That's great Tofu.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's great Tofu.

items.line_en: Now it's your duty to calculate these bills my big boy.

coach.say: Now it's your duty to calculate these bills my big boy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now it's your duty to calculate these bills my big boy.
